tasks.prompt: Edit this paragraph for clarity and conciseness: 'The company has been working on developing new products that will help customers save money and time when they are shopping online for various items.'
Explain 3 key factors to consider when evaluating a company's financial health. Keep it brief and practical.
Draft a professional response to a customer complaint: 'I ordered a product 2 weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived. This is unacceptable!'
Create a simple checklist for onboarding a new employee in their first week. Include 5-7 essential items.
List 4 common compliance risks in a small business and one mitigation strategy for each.
Explain the difference between cash accounting and accrual accounting. When should a small business use each?
Describe 3 warning signs that a child may be experiencing difficulties at home, and appropriate initial steps to take.
Outline a basic cybersecurity policy for a 10-person company. Focus on the 3 most critical areas.
A guest asks for restaurant recommendations for a romantic anniversary dinner. Describe what questions you would ask and how you would personalize your suggestions.
What are 4 key factors to evaluate when choosing between two suppliers for office supplies? Explain briefly.
